rules.rule: Check for XSS vulnerabilities: unsafe innerHTML, dangerouslySetInnerHTML, document.write, or direct DOM injection
Check for SQL injection: string concatenation in queries, unsanitized user input in execute/query calls
Check for NullPointerException risks: method parameters, return values, and chained calls without null checks
Check for thread-safety issues: shared mutable state without synchronization, missing locks on concurrent access
Check for eval() usage, Function constructor with string args, and other dynamic code execution patterns
Check for command injection: unsanitized input in exec/spawn/shell/system calls
Check for Goroutine leaks, missing error handling, and incorrect use of defer
Check for unsafe code blocks, transmute misuse, and Send/Sync trait violations
Check for SQL injection patterns, missing parameterized queries, and privilege escalation risks
Check for security best practices: avoid root user, pin base image versions, minimize layers, no secrets in build args
Check Kubernetes/IaC security: privilege escalation, host network access, secrets in config, missing resource limits
Check Terraform security: hardcoded secrets, open security group rules, unencrypted storage, missing logging
Check dependency configuration: insecure protocols, hardcoded credentials, outdated plugin versions
Check for secrets exposure: API keys, tokens, passwords committed to version control
